summary: Boncos V3 testing complete. Backend: 14/14 tests passing (100%). Frontend: All V3 features working - PATCH /api/budgets, bulk delete, auto-refill, notification-check, history checkboxes, select all, X delete icon, fixed filter pills, edit budget modal with thousand separator.

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' instead. This is a React Native Web deprecation warning but doesn't affect functionality.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Minor deprecation warning, no functional impact.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ PATCH /api/budgets/{budget_id} working correctly - adjusts current_balance proportionally when total_balance changes
✓ POST /api/expenses/bulk-delete working correctly - deletes multiple expenses and restores balances to correct budgets
✓ Auto-refill logic working in GET /api/budgets and GET /api/dashboard - resets budget when refill_date passes and sets new refill_date +30 days
✓ GET /api/notification-check working correctly - returns needs_reminder based on daily checkin
✓ Frontend History screen completely rewritten with SectionList - checkboxes, select all, bulk delete with confirmation, X delete icon all working
✓ Frontend Settings screen has edit modal for budget pots - allows editing label, total_balance (with thousand separator), and refill_date
✓ Filter pills in History have fixed height (not expanding) - correct implementation
✓ LogBox.ignoreLogs configured to suppress font loading errors
✓ All testID attributes present for testing
✓ Thousand separator working correctly in edit modal (5000000 displays as 5.000.000)
✓ Tab navigation working correctly between Beranda, Riwayat, Pengaturan
✓ Budget pot selector working with multiple pots
✓ All existing endpoints still working after V3 changes
seed_data_creation: Created test user (frontend_test_v3@boncos.app) with session token and 2 budget pots (Makan & Jajan: 3M IDR, Transport: 500K IDR) and 3 expenses for frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All V3 features working perfectly. New endpoints (PATCH /api/budgets, POST /api/expenses/bulk-delete, GET /api/notification-check) fully functional. Auto-refill logic working correctly. Frontend history screen completely rewritten with all new features (checkboxes, select all, bulk delete, X delete icon, fixed filter pills). Settings edit modal working with thousand separator. No bugs found.
